items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-80 westbound between 2.2 miles east of Exit 45: PA 478 - ELMENTON/ST PETERSBURG and 1.4 miles east of Exit 45: PA 478 - ELMENTON/ST PETERSBURG. There is a lane restriction.
